title: craftquests music disc collection
description: a collection of my favorite music discs
body:
This mod introduces three unique and rare music discs, each linked to specific structures within Minecraft. Explore the world, discover new locations, and craft these rare discs to add some rhythm to your adventures!

New Music Discs:
Bastion

Source: Can be found in Bastions Remnants.
Description: This intense and atmospheric track is a rare find in the dangerous depths of the Bastion, adding an epic soundtrack to the perilous atmosphere of these ancient fortresses.
Jungle Temple

Source: Dropped by Jungle Temple Parts, found in Jungle Temples.
Description: A calming yet mysterious tune that captures the essence of the jungle’s dense foliage and hidden temples. Discover it by solving the secrets of the jungle ruins.
Prismarine Watchers

Source: Found in Ocean Monuments.
Description: An otherworldly melody that echoes through the vast oceans. It can be found within the depths of Ocean Monuments, where the Watchers guard their secrets and treasures.
These music discs are not only rare and mysterious, but they also bring new sounds to Minecraft, encouraging players to explore and uncover the secrets of the world’s most dangerous structures. Whether you’re navigating a Bastion, exploring a jungle temple, or diving deep into the ocean, each music disc has a story to tell.
